Kukoon · Google Shopping United Kingdom
Brand Performance Overview
Full 18-month Google Shopping ranking trajectory · Oct 2024 – Mar 2026
📡 Data Source
Rankings reflect actual purchase activity across all retailers on Google Shopping United Kingdom — not Kukoon-specific sales data. Rank #1 = most purchased product in the Rugs category. Gaps indicate months the product was not in tracked rankings. This view covers all Kukoon products appearing in any month across the 18-month window.
All Kukoon Products — Rank Trajectory
Lower rank = higher demand · Y-axis inverted (top = best) · Gaps = not in tracked rankings that month
Google Shopping United Kingdom · Rugs
Market Overview
18-month demand signals · Oct 2024 – Mar 2026 · All brands & products
📡 Data Source — Google Merchant Centre
Sourced from Google Merchant Centre's "Products Customers Are Buying on Google" report, exported monthly for United Kingdom (Rugs category). Rankings reflect actual purchase frequency across all retailers. Overview sections show products achieving rank ≤500 in at least 2 months. The All Products Explorer contains all 10,464 tracked products.
Top Rug Products — Monthly Rank Trajectory
Lower = higher demand · Top 20 best-ranking products shown by default
Trend Classification
↑ High Growth Products
Rugs products with significantly improved average rank in Jan–Mar 2026 vs Oct–Dec 2025
📡 Classification
High Growth = average rank in Jan–Mar 2026 (recent) at least 30% better than Oct–Dec 2025 (prior), or products appearing strongly recently but absent prior. Signals accelerating consumer demand on Google Shopping United Kingdom in the Rugs category.
High Growth — Rank Trajectories
Top 15 by best recent rank · Lower = stronger demand
Trend Classification
◆ Consistent Performers
Rugs products with sustained strong demand across both recent and prior periods
📡 Classification
Consistent = strong ranking in both recent (Jan–Mar 2026) and prior (Oct–Dec 2025) periods with less than 20% average rank change. Durable demand — the benchmark competitive set Kukoon competes against in the United Kingdom rugs market.
Consistent — Rank Trajectories
Rug products maintaining strong demand presence across multiple periods
══════ -->
Trend Classification
↓ Cooling Off
Rugs products that ranked strongly previously but demand has materially softened
📡 Classification
Cooling Off = average rank in Jan–Mar 2026 at least 40% worse than Oct–Dec 2025. Demand has materially weakened — may reflect category trends, seasonality, competitive displacement, or product lifecycle changes in the United Kingdom rugs market.
Cooling Off — Historical Trajectories
Peak demand periods and subsequent decline
Full Dataset
All Products Explorer
10,464 rugs products · Filter by brand or keyword · Click up to 3 rows to compare trajectories
📡 Explorer Guide
Default shows products ranked ≤500 in at least 2 months. Search any of the 10,464 tracked rugs products by keyword — try "Shaggy", "Washable", "Runner", "Wool", "Jute", "Flatweave", "Abstract". Use brand filter to narrow by brand. ▲ green = rank improving, ▼ red = rank worsening. Click rows to compare.
Click any row to view its rank trajectory. Click up to 3 rows to compare side by side. Use the Price toggle to switch to price view.

Monthly rank · Lower = higher demand · Gaps = not in tracked rankings

Market Pricing
Price Analysis
Min/Max GBP price ranges from Google Merchant Centre · Reflects all sellers on Google Shopping United Kingdom
📡 About Pricing Data
Prices reflect the range across all retailers on Google Shopping United Kingdom — not any single seller's price. Min = lowest listed; Max = highest. Showing rug products with rank ≤200 in at least 2 months with available price data.
